subject: Executive horizon: one broad decision frontier without an unauthorized will

spirals.measure: Accepted obligations from integrity, prereg, market, and forecast ledgers are ranked by cost of delay and rendered with evidence, executor tier, authority, and next route.
Tests preserve integrity-first ordering and external authority; drift checks every frontier item remains structurally non-authorizing.

current_truth: The live horizon surfaced three stale immune receipts, two due preregs, and six future WAIT contracts. It did not replay, score, contact, or decide for any of them.
priority_law: integrity rot > overdue mechanical observation > overdue scoring > external-market deadline > upcoming obligation
next_kill: Remove the horizon if it can execute a displayed next route, loses evidence/executor/authority, or treats ranking as permission.
